headline.text: L3 ML4 gondola exit belt missing screw — *metal shavings* found in product zone, maintenance called at 06:27.

summary: Two active foreign-material events at L3 ML4 (bolt under hood, missing screw with metal shavings at gondola). One hold at L2 grinding (440 lbs Graham product, torn bag/damaged box). Multiple sanitation gaps flagged at L1 S2 kitchen following heavy wash.

holds.title: 440 lbs ground Grahams on hold, torn bag in damaged box
holds.summary: Grinding team discovered torn inner bag and holes in bottom of box near end of processing Graham (Item 10139); 440 lbs ground + 20 lbs unprocessed isolated for inspection, possible forklift damage to packaging.
holds.status: On hold pending QA inspection for potential foreign material from damaged packaging.

food_safety.title: Metal shavings at ML4 gondola exit belt, screw missing
food_safety.summary: Gondola exit belt area missing one screw with metal shavings inside product zone at 06:27; maintenance called, line stopped.
food_safety.status: Maintenance responded; M6 bolt needed, Nelson Cook on way at 06:28.

food_safety.title: Shoe found in S2 Kitchen Area
food_safety.summary: One shoe discovered in S2 Kitchen Area at 02:10; GMP violation, Jody to discuss with team.
food_safety.status: Removed; floor supervisor will address with team.

food_safety.title: Bolt/screw found under ML4 pre-heating hood #2
food_safety.summary: During extensive clean at 03:01, bolt or screw discovered under pre-heating hood #2; maintenance notified, hood later found damaged during photo inspection.
food_safety.status: Maintenance fixed pre-heating hood #2 before startup; depositing began 05:38.

food_safety.title: Plastic wrapper pieces in remelt chocolate tote
food_safety.summary: One tote of chocolate for remelt received with pieces of plastic wrapper mixed in; unwrapping teams must ensure no plastic remains in totes.
food_safety.status: Tote identified, teams instructed to verify no plastic in remelt material going forward.

food_safety.title: Cardboard found at S3 line start from cereal pallet
food_safety.summary: Employee detected piece of cardboard at beginning of line, determined to be from cereal pallet; team reminded to inspect before loading product into Z conveyor.
food_safety.status: Cardboard removed; team reminded to inspect boxes before use.

quality.title: S4 caramel viscosity high, samples for R&D
quality.summary: Three consecutive viscosity readings elevated (see 21:22, 21:42, 03:22 reports); R&D requested samples from each batch for evaluation tomorrow.
quality.status: Samples pulled and labeled for R&D; kitchen stopped production at 03:45.

quality.title: S3 glycol on product (smiling face eyes)
quality.summary: Glycol visible on eyes of smiling-face product at 14:52; operator flagged, cause under investigation.

sanitation.title: S2 kitchen wet area, rusty water under curtain
sanitation.summary: Wet area next to S2 kitchen floor where heavy wash done; section of rusty water underneath curtain, may require cutting curtain bottom and replacing to dry properly.
sanitation.status: Open; FSQA Manager requested walk-through at 13:33, no response at window close.

sanitation.title: S2 tunnel pecan found, table greasy
sanitation.summary: Visual inspection of Tunnel 2 found one pecan and heavy grease on table at 11:57.
sanitation.status: Flagged for re-clean; no status update at window close.

sanitation.title: Room 8 curtain not pulled, salt/chocolate left on floor
sanitation.summary: During Room 8 cleaning, curtain not pulled down, so salt and chocolate particles fell to floor after clean was called complete; cleaning shift did not have time to address.
sanitation.status: Open at shift end; photos attached, no follow-up at window close.

sanitation.title: S2 kitchen shoe sanitization reminder
sanitation.summary: All operators and visitors walking through S2 kitchen must sanitize shoes on exit; communicated across shifts.

allergen.title: 60g molds found in 35g mold tote at ML1
allergen.summary: Visual inspection of 35g mold tote found 30 molds of 60g size mixed in; no tracking paperwork exists for mold washing, multiple employees working washroom causes mix-ups.
allergen.status: Molds segregated; day shift keeping same employees in washroom daily to reduce errors.

allergen.title: Truffles found in supersacks from previous L3 run
allergen.summary: L3 receiving truffles left in supersacks after emptying at FFS; L2 has inspection process after emptying, L3 creating OPL and training materials.
allergen.status: OPL created for MFM supersack inspection; one supersack inspected and flagged SRS dark chocolate in morning.

opportunities.text: Review S2 kitchen cleaning SOP and sign-off — curtain left wet with rusty water pooled underneath after heavy wash, Room 8 curtain not pulled during clean leaving salt/chocolate on floor.
Consider labeling cereal-handling tools or adding inspection step before Z-conveyor loading on S3 — cardboard from cereal pallet found at line start.
Consider adding pre-startup hardware inspection to ML4 extensive-clean checklist — today's bolt under pre-heating hood and missing gondola screw both found during or after cleaning cycles.
Review mold-washing workflow and accountability — 60g molds found in 35g tote at ML1, no tracking paperwork exists, multiple employees rotating through washroom.
